ground_truth.findings: Frontal and lateral views of the chest show normal size and configuration of the cardiac silhouette. The right costophrenic sulcus is blunted. There is an the right base [REDACTED]/fluid level. The left lung is clear.
ground_truth.impression: 1. Right-sided small pleural effusion. 2. Right base [REDACTED]/fluid level. Atypical location for a hiatal hernia. Cannot exclude a right lower lobe cavity. Correlation [REDACTED] scan recommended. Does not appear to be a hydropneumothorax or empyema.
